name: Blueberrinni Octopussini
lore:
Lore of Blueberrinni Octopussini
                                    


The character's upper body resembles that of an octopus, adorned with a blueberry. Its diminutive size, comparable to that of a blueberry, allows it to deftly evade incoming attacks.
Despite its small and fragile stature, this character is not particularly suited for combat. However, it can still display remarkable agility and charm when facing off against Glorbo Portuddrilo.
Description original text
Blueberrinni Octopussini. Bloop, bloop, bloop, octopussi. Questo picolo animale vive sul fondale Marino e si gode la sua dolce vite. Brava ragazza, rispetto.
Blue Berinni Octopusini Blob, Blob, Blob, Oktopushi. Marino Pondale lives in his zoo and I still live in Suiel Adviete. Let's go to Brara, Lisetto.
